authz-invoice-view:
def open_invoice(actor, invoice_id, correlation_id):
    inv = repo.get_invoice(invoice_id)
    if not actor.can_view(inv):
        logger.info('audit', audit=True, control='access.authz', action='invoice.view', actor=actor.id, target={'type':'invoice','id':invoice_id}, outcome='denied', reason='not_owner', ts=now(), correlation_id=correlation_id)
        raise Forbidden()
    logger.info('audit', audit=True, control='access.authz', action='invoice.view', actor=actor.id, target={'type':'invoice','id':invoice_id}, outcome='allowed', ts=now(), correlation_id=correlation_id)
    return inv
authn-set-password:
import bcrypt
def set_password(user, raw_password):
    user.pw_hash = bcrypt.hashpw(raw_password.encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
    repo.save(user)
